panels.heading: Background
panels.bodyText: A talented graphic designer, user experience engineer, and digital artist, with a passon for creating visually stunning and user-friendly designs

panels.heading: Expertise
panels.bodyText: Decades of experience managing high-volume creative and marketing operations across healthcare, technology, biotech, and agency environments. Built Creative Services departments from the ground up, directed C-suite communications, and delivered multichannel campaigns under tight deadlines.

panels.heading: UX
panels.bodyText: Specializing in user experience engineering, ensuring that your website or application is intuitive, user-friendly, and optimized for maximum engagement.
